title: freesia refracta
intro: Freesia refracta, a type of flowering plant belonging to the Iridaceae family, is native to South Africa and is commonly known for its beautiful and fragrant white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Freesia refracta include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Freesia refracta can be made by infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by drying the flowers to make a powder that can be used in capsules or taken orally.
